name: @winnorton/cairn-pi
description_en: Cairn's authoring-and-orchestration loop for the Pi coding agent: /skill:spec, /skill:program, /skill:round-review, /skill:fast-execute, /skill:peer-review, /skill:note. Markdown skills only — no runtime code.
